about.title: Summary
about.text: I am an agile fullstack consultant passionate about open source frontend and backend technologies. I like to develop software using cloud solutions, all in line with the Devops movement.

educationLevel.title: Education Level
educationLevel.effectiveLevelDetail: Backed by 20 years of professional experience
educationLevel.diplomaDetail: Professional Bachelor in Computer Science and Software Systems

seo.description: This is my new professional resume
seo.title: Thomas Couderc's resume

jpb-systeme-2024.description: Fullstack IoT development on the Keyvibe product (Keyprod startup): real-time acquisition and cloud telemetry.
bullets: Multi-threshold production detection on Raspberry Pi 3/4 (Python, Node.js) — real-time machine state analysis.
Ethernet → MQTT → AWS IoT Core → Lambda pipeline: low latency, scalable, DHCPD-configured.

blablacar-2023.description: New cash refund module for BlablaCar-operated buses.
bullets: New Spring Boot microservice for refunds.
React refund tab inside the Zendesk back-office.

smartch-2023.description: SaaS e-learning platform: backend design and development.
bullets: Kotlin/Ktor GraphQL API with Exposed persistence on PostgreSQL.
Hexagonal architecture and CI/CD pipelines.

sncf-reseaux-dgex-solutions-2022.description: Growth and quality strategy on the OSRD open source project (SAFe). Cross-team technical backlog ownership.
bullets: SAFe coaching of several teams on an open source railway product.
Cross-team technical backlog: observability, build, releases.
Rust and Python contributions on the simulator core.

leboncoin-2021.description: Payment engine rewrite and design of an internal wallet.
bullets: Hexagonal architecture in a Go monorepo.
Event-driven Kafka pipeline; Datadog and ELK observability.
Internal wallet POC and technical spikes.

celsius-energy-2020.description: IoT logging and monitoring for a geothermal energy solution.
bullets: Designed a scalable real-time dashboard architecture for an IoT fleet.
Automated CI/CD pipelines: unit, integration and e2e tests.
Scrum methodology inside a cross-functional team.

relevanc-2020.description: Bootstrap of the Coupilo multitenant couponing rewrite.
bullets: Java 11 / Spring Boot foundation generated with JHipster.
Hexagonal architecture deployed on GCP.

ecocea-2019.description: Software factory overhaul for the Manutan e-commerce website.
bullets: Software factory modernization: Jenkins → GitLab CI.
WebSphere Commerce build industrialization (Gradle, Docker).
React onboarding support for the frontend teams.

edelia-2016.description: Design and development of systems tied to electricity, water and gas metering.
bullets: Calculation backend for Sowee connected thermostats.
Digital transformation program, DevOps workstream.
Mon Eco Service hybrid mobile app (fullstack design and delivery).

jcdecaux-2015.description: Mobile apps for maintaining the group's street furniture.
bullets: Java 8 / Spring Boot backend and field apps, delivered in Scrum.

lotsys-filiale-fdj-2014.description: Studies and development on the FDJ backend.
bullets: Session management in a clustered environment.
REST API development on the gateway.

mediametrie-2013.description: API design and development for an audience measurement system.
bullets: Scrum-based R&D activities.
POC of an audience tag quality measurement tool.
Internet nomenclature integrator as part of a global project.

thales-communications-2012.description: Open source intelligence analysis platform — social network and opinion analysis (CenTAI Lab, THALES R&D).
bullets: Performance audit and processing pipeline optimization.
Scalable Internet proof service.
Load-balancing integration for an NLP tool.
GWT interfaces and virtual machine templates.

mediapost-2011.description: Intranet contracting tool for La Poste's printed advertising products.
bullets: POC of a Selenium Hub-based testing solution.
Scrum facilitation (sprints, reviews, retros, dailies).
